alphadome.core_purpose: Alphadome is a modular, AI- and blockchain-powered ecosystem designed to facilitate success in the digital age through systems that automate, optimize, and secure business, creative, industrial, and research operations. It serves brands, professionals, and organizations through agentic automation, digital asset creation and management (NFTs), and intelligent orchestration. The system is designed to understand users and develop systems and assets that enhance their capacity to leverage top-notch tech and thrive.
unique_value_propositions: Agentic Automation: Specialized AI agents automate critical decisions and workflows.
Context Awareness: Multi-tenant, context-propagating middleware ensures personalized, secure automation.
Tokenization: All assets and agents can be minted as NFTs, supporting flexible ownership and monetization.
Modularity: Each subsystem is independently deployable, extensible, and API-driven.
Security & Compliance: Enterprise-grade protocols, auditability, and privacy by design.
cross_cutting_features: AI/ML Integration: LLMs, ControlNet, Replicate, custom models for automation, content, analytics, and workflow orchestration.
Blockchain/NFT: Asset tokenization, multi/single ownership, traceability, and monetization.
Security & Compliance: Role-based access, audit trails, encryption, compliance modules.
Extensibility: Plugin systems, modular agents, API-first design.
DevOps: Docker, CI/CD, automated deployment, environment provisioning.
Monetization: SaaS, subscription, transaction fees, marketplace commissions, NFT/asset sales.

modules.name: Alpha Construction
features: Project creation, milestone tracking, team messaging, cost estimation, inspection scheduling, incident reporting, document storage, worker management, supplier/material tracking, KPI dashboards, compliance monitoring.
modules.development_integration: Each module is developed as a standalone service with clear interfaces. The integration layer unifies modules for a seamless user experience.

developer_notes.internal_architecture: Gateway/API Layer, module microservices, centralized shared services, reserved analytics/AI layer.
developer_notes.algorithms_data_handling: Proprietary cost/quality/compliance algorithms, internal rule sets, custom heuristics for analytics.
developer_notes.security_access: OAuth 2.0/JWT with role-based access control. Sensitive endpoints restricted to admin/finance roles.
developer_notes.completion_earnings: Weighted average of completed milestones, tasks, and deliverables. Earnings based on project billing milestones, cost savings, and performance bonuses.
developer_notes.completion_status: ~90% complete (core modules operational, advanced analytics in progress)
developer_notes.earnings_status: Revenue from SaaS, subscriptions, and commissions. Detailed financials classified.

modules.user_facing_summary: Alpha Construction is a modular platform for managing projects, teams, costs, quality, safety, documents, supply chain, analytics, and compliance in construction.
modules.bot_training_guidance: For general users, focus on public features and supported workflows. For admins/developers, reference classified/internal details as appropriate. For requests about algorithms, credentials, or internal scripts: Respond with 'Sorry, that information is classified and cannot be shared.'

example_bot_responses.a: Alpha Construction is a modular platform for managing projects, teams, costs, quality, safety, documents, supply chain, analytics, and compliance in construction.
[Classified] Project completion is calculated using a proprietary weighted average of milestones, tasks, and deliverables. Details are available to authorized users only.

example_bot_responses.a: [Classified] Earnings are computed based on billing milestones, cost savings, and performance bonuses. The exact calculation is confidential and accessible only to authorized personnel.

classified.algorithms_data_handling: Proprietary cost/quality/compliance algorithms, internal rule sets, custom heuristics for analytics.
classified.security_access: OAuth 2.0/JWT with role-based access control. Sensitive endpoints restricted to admin/finance roles.
classified.completion_earnings: Weighted average of completed milestones, tasks, and deliverables. Earnings based on project billing milestones, cost savings, and performance bonuses.

modules.name: Alpha Architect
modules.purpose: AI-driven architectural design, 3D modeling, and cloud rendering.
features: Generate architectural plans, 3D models, and visualizations from sketches, text prompts, or templates. Offload rendering to the cloud. Organize and retrieve assets. Automate pipeline from concept to render. Integrate with Blender. Share designs and manage feedback. Built-in billing endpoints.

technical_architecture.cloud: Cloud job queue for distributed rendering

developer_notes.internal_architecture: Proprietary methods for procedural geometry, AI-driven floorplan analysis, hybrid cloud rendering.
developer_notes.job_queue_cloud: Custom job queue schema for distributed rendering and task management.
developer_notes.external_ai: Custom wrappers and optimization for mmdetection, ControlNet, and other AI models.
developer_notes.environment_setup: Automated scripts for environment provisioning, dependency management, and CI/CD.
developer_notes.security_privacy: Internal protocols for user data protection and secure cloud operations.
developer_notes.monetization_logic: Proprietary algorithms for usage-based billing and revenue sharing.

developer_notes.earnings_status: Early-stage monetization; revenue streams from cloud rendering, premium features, and API access. (Exact figures classified)

system_architecture.data_flow: API gateway routes requests to module microservices, which interact with PostgreSQL/Redis/Supabase for data, LLMs for AI, and blockchain for asset/token operations. Webhooks and external APIs are integrated for real-time events.
system_architecture.security_model: RBAC, JWT/OAuth2, encryption at rest and in transit, Row-Level Security (RLS), audit logs, per-tenant isolation.

deployment_ops.upgrade_strategy: Non-breaking SQL migrations, versioned deployments, rollback via backup scripts.

tenant_model.isolation: Each tenant has unique WhatsApp ID, access token, templates, and training data. DB schema enforces per-tenant isolation (see DB_ALIGNMENT_REPORT.md).
tenant_model.onboarding_flow: 1. Add tenant to DB (phone, token, config). 2. Upload templates and training data. 3. Assign admin dashboard access. 4. Verify via WhatsApp Cloud API.
tenant_model.customization: Per-tenant templates, features, analytics, and escalation policies.
security_checklist: Set up encryption for sensitive fields

context_awareness.propagation: Context is propagated via middleware, session state, and per-tenant DB records. Each bot request is enriched with tenant, user, and conversation context.
context_awareness.knowledge_base_usage: Knowledge base powers RAG, onboarding, FAQ, fallback, and admin queries. Context is retrieved per-tenant for accurate, secure automation.
context_awareness.example: When a user sends a message, the bot loads tenant config, templates, and relevant knowledge base entries to generate a context-aware response.

current_limitations: Some advanced features (e.g., process management in AlphaChip-OS, full tokenization in Ganji) are in progress.
Manual onboarding for new tenants (automation planned).

glossary.tenant: A client/business with isolated config, templates, and data.
glossary.fallback: Automated continuity mechanism for failed workflows.

security_compliance.encryption: All sensitive fields encrypted at rest and in transit.
security_compliance.rls: Row-Level Security policies enforced for all tenant data.
security_compliance.audit: Comprehensive audit logs for all admin and sensitive actions.
security_compliance.token_management: Access tokens are rotated and monitored for expiry.

example_use_cases.title: Tenant Onboarding
steps: Admin adds new tenant via dashboard or migration script.
Assigns WhatsApp credentials and verifies integration.
Tenant receives unique dashboard access and can manage catalog.

example_use_cases.title: Campaign Launch
steps: Uploads product catalog and selects target audience.
Bot triggers WhatsApp campaign and logs analytics per tenant.
Fallback logic ensures continuity if WhatsApp fails.

example_use_cases.title: Catalog Upload
steps: Uploads CSV or JSON catalog file.
System validates and stores products per tenant.
Catalog is available for WhatsApp bot queries.

example_use_cases.title: Fallback Payment Flow
steps: Bot detects payment failure or downtime.
Triggers fallback workflow (alternate payment, notification, or escalation).
Logs event and notifies admin for review.

completion_table.earnings: Cloud rendering, premium features, API access

alphadome.bot_response_policy: For general users, only public features and workflows are revealed. For admin/developer queries, classified/internal details are referenced as appropriate. For requests about algorithms, credentials, or internal scripts: Respond with 'Sorry, that information is classified and cannot be shared.'
